titleStmt.title: SII 35.105A: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 105a. (A.R. No. 93 of 1950-51.)

summary.p: This inscription referring to the reign of Śivachitta Vīra-Permāḍi is dated in his 12th year, Bahudhānya, Āśvayuja śu. 15, Monday, lunar-eclipse corresponding to A.D. 1158, October 9, the week day being Thursday.
It records a gift of land made by Daṇḍanāyaka Mallarasa-mahāprabhu of Pulivara, and prabhu Mallidēva to god Māchēśvara. Vāchaṇa of Puli is mentioned as the slave of god Māchēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maḥ namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁndrācāmaracāravē traiḷōkyaṁnagarāraṁbhamūla
vē . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ .
madhigatapaṁcamahāśabudamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvarā
tige bhairava kādaṁbakūmmakū¨rmmavatāraṁ mū¨rtinārāyaṇaṁ saṁkrā
dhavaḷaṁ nissaṁkarāmanabhinavapā¨rtthaṁ subhaṭaratī¨rttha niṭaṭṭiṟivāta pāraṭīparasurā
manubhayadēsivallabhaṁ tribhuvanamaṁḍaḷika sikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇi
tyākhiḷarājyāvaḷī samāḷaṁkritarappa śrīmajjayakēsidēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁsaluttamire tatu
pādapadmārādhakaṁ sakaḷagaṇagaṇāḷaṁkaraṇabhūṣaṇa parivārasurabhi karaṇīya kaṁka
ṇa barisa jayakēsidēvana¨rddhāṁgalakṣmi cāḷukyakuḷapavitreyarumappa maiḷalamahādēviya
ru kuṁdūra neluvīḍinoḷu sukhadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . vri . toḷaguva kuṁ
taḷāṁganeya kuṁtaḷadēsamideṁbinaṁ karaṁ palasigenāḍu śōbhisutavi¨rppanegaṁ dharegiṁtu gāḍiyaṁ
baḷayisi dēvarājanamarāvatiyaṁ naguvaṁtirippudī pulivaraveṁtu baṇnipaḍameṁtupoga
ḷpaḍameṁtu nō¨rppaḍa . ka . Ā grāmacakrava¨rtiyoḷagriyanabhimāni mānadhananenisi¨rṛdaṁ
vigrahakutūhaḷaṁ sujanāgraṇiyaṁ dāsirājanaṁ pogaḷadarāru . Ā dāsi
rājanaṁgane mādhavana pinākiyajanavaniteya¨rggappī pādanege migilenippaḷu mēdiniyo
ḷu jakkaṇabbe lalanāratna . kaṁ . Ā mithuna¨rkkaḷugaja hari kāmāṁtakanudiyisu
tirudiyisi nega¨rddā śrīmallidēva lakṣmasōmara¨rssujanarenipa mūva¨rttaneya
ru . Ā lakkarasana kulavadhu bhūlalane samāne sāṁtikabbege puṭṭiṟdalōkadoḷage guṇadoḷ mēle
nisidanidhita śau¨ryadiṁ poḷalarasa . lakkarasaṁgaṁ guṇadoḷu mikkīsati muddikabbegaṁ puṭṭi jagakkakku
mivarenisi nega¨rddīta¨rkkū¨rmmeya sōmamallanuṁ mādhavanuṁ . svasti śrī madūraḍeya mallarasa
raṁ sōvarasaraṁ gōviṁdarasana mānasaru baḍidu kuṭṭi peḍagayya kaṭṭi voṟa riṁdaṁ poṟamaṭṭu
pōgivenalu bāragiyara bāceyaṇnanaḍḍaṁ baṁdu tividu bīḷalemma jātiyī vritti
yalu nelasidane dūri mūḍaṇa piriyakeṟe modalēriya keḷage tamma mānya
da sthaḷadoḷage sa¨rvvābādhaparihāramāgi koṭṭa ga¨rdde kammaṁ 450 magiliṁ teṁkalu padinaiydu ka
yya maneya nivēśaṇamaṁ salisuvaru . svastisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī
matu bhūlōkavariṣada 11 neya naḷasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 3 sōmavāradaṁdubāraṁ
giyara bācaṇnaśrīmācēsvaradēva¨rgge taṁna mānyadakeyya nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ biṭṭa ga¨rdde kammaṁ
450 svasti śrīkādaṁbaśivacitta śrīvīrape¨rmāḍidēvava¨rṣa 12 neya bahudānyasaṁva
tsarada Āsvayuja suddha puṇnami sōmavāradevasa sōmagrahaṇadalu
śrīmatu pulivaradamahāprabhu daṁḍanāyakaṁ mallarasaruṁ prabhu malli
dēvanuṁ Ūriṁ mūḍa hiriyakeṟeya modalēriya keḷage kammaṭēśvara nakharēśvaradēva
ra keyiṁ baḍagalu śrīmācēśvaradēva¨rgge sa¨rvvanamaśyamāgi biṭṭa sarivu kammaṁ
nūṟu 100 śrīpūliya bāraygarabācaṇa śrīmācēśva
ra dēvara tottu śrī svadattaṁ [paradattaṁ saha]
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ © © ©
Digital edition of SII 35.105A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
